title: wolfhsm error.rs: WolfHsmError enum and check() helper
description: Create wolfhsm/src/error.rs. Define WolfHsmError enum with variants: Wh { code: i32 } for all WH_ERROR_* codes, and Ffi { code: i32, func: &'static str } for wolfSSL/wolfCrypt errors. Implement check(rc: i32, func: &'static str) -> Result<(), WolfHsmError>: rc == 0 => Ok(()), rc in [-2302..-2000] range => Err(Wh { code: rc }), else => Err(Ffi { code: rc, func }). Implement Debug, Display (include error code value), Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq. In lib.rs: pub mod error; pub use error::WolfHsmError;
